title: Kaworu Shinji Relationship
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu/Shinji Relationship             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Mon Nov 19, 2012 3:37 pm So far from whats been told to us from people who have actually seen 3.0, Kaworu's reason for liking and caring for Shinji still isn't explained. He somehow knows Shinji when he wakes up and and does everything he can to help him, even waiting 14 years him. Why does Nerv even need Shinji at this point? Couldn't they just stick another 14 year old kid into Unit 13 with Kaworu? In fact, it makes you wonder why they even needed something like Unit 13 in the first place, why wouldn't a normal Eva work just as well? And if Gendo/SEELE needed Shinji with Kaworu for their plans, why did they wait 14 fucking years for WILL-E to get him rather than do it themselves? Too many fucking questions and plot holes.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Mon Nov 19, 2012 3:42 pm I mean, Rei (Tentative) is like.. right there, for a number of years you would think. I'm holding out judgement till I actually see the damn thing though. /shrug

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Nov 19, 2012 4:44 pm Apparently the procedure needed two souls involved to work, and Rei couldn't be used because her soul is "somewhere else." Add that Shinji is the easiest person to manipulate, like, EVER, and...

[]:             Quote Post by Emperoreddy » Sat Nov 24, 2012 1:52 am [Split from here .] Keep watching the piano scene, I'm getting the impression that visually alone the Shinji/Kaworu dynamic will be getting a lot more fleshed out then it ever has before. There is just so many little visual details going on that seems to ring a lot stronger then a straight "I Love You". Kaworu still doesn't know what personal space is, but it comes off as a bit more subdued. How he seemingly enjoys watching Shinji flop about a bit, before he scoots him over, gives me a look and throws him in the deep end by going all virtuoso on him. Makes knowing his ultimate fate hurt even more so, know that scene is going to hit hard. (Doesn't help most of the trailers have the shot of Shinji in tears, which is heartbreaking in of itself).

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Nov 24, 2012 11:35 am ^Many ppl who saw it do indeed say that it gives the relationship a lot more time and detail. What I already know is: - The "died for your sins"-angle gets very explicit lampshading in their dialogue, first Kaworu calls the explosive collar and then he takes it and says he'll shoulder the burden for him (which is how he convinces Shinji to board EVA 13 - believe it or not he was originally gonna follow the warnings he was given and stay away from em doomsday machines) - There's an interesting bit that sheds some light on Kaworu's side of the equation - essentially, Shinji is all speechless when Kaworu takes the bomb collar, but then Kaworu reassures him, telling him that "he was gonna do it anyway since he was originally something created by people who fear him"... so maybe the reason Kaworu's so crazy about Shinji is that Kaworu, in fact, views Shinji a lot like Shinji views Kaworu. This does confirm the theory that Kaworu was something created (that he's "the 1st Angel" also gets stated out loud, and 2.0 already revealed his human donor - so all those theories of us about him were right. Okay, this is Rebuild, but the original kinda left this open/ let us piece it together as we did. The most common suspect for his human donor here seems to be Dr. K, the German fandom mostly suspected Keel because of Kaworu's association with SEELE, but I think Gendo makes sense. First, the Rei parallel. Second, all that very vague parallelism ("you betrayed me!", "He's... like me?" etc.) Third, it's possible. Katsuragi: So you've been called back one day before the big experiment? Such bad luck! Gendo: *smirk* I don't consider myself unlucky at all. (after all, this is gonna blow up on your ass) Katsuragi: Well, we'll use your DNA fór the test so you don't feel left out XD Gendo: I'd rather have some parenting tips, my wife is pregnant. Katsuragi: Well.... why don't cha ask Akagi or Soryu-san instead? - I didn't understand shit but even so I could understand from the audio rip and use of music how PERFECT the 4I scene was in that respect. First, things go horribly wrong and ode to joy starts to play. Then, God's wrath. And then it all goes quiet and silent and all we hear is them talking. Heck, I think Kaworu even tried to console Shinji once he resolved to kill himself. I'm sure there's something like Shinji being horrified at what's happening and bawling that he's such an idiot or something, and Kaworu says something like "It's not your fault, this happened because I'm an angel" and "sorry that I couldn't give you the happiness you needed, looks like you'll have to find your hope yourself " (not sure, puzzled together with fangirl jap) ...of course, the consolation doesn't quite work because even if the trap was meant for Kaworu, Shinji was the one who stepped into it, ironically to return the favor and take the burden of the decision from Kaworu. So while Shinji didn't kill him, he's still gonna feel just as guilty, if not more - at least squishing him in episode 24 also saved the world, but this time, Shinji nearly destroyed both. Not to mention that Kaworu's sacrifice was ultimately senseless , 4I didn't stop! It was Mari who ended it by pulling Shinji out. OUCH. It's like then entire universe is conspiring against Shinji, really. This time, he's willing to help (the character development from 2.0 stuck) he's willing to make hard choices (like to fight Asuka), but it doesn't help because he's still a clueless pawn. It's like he can't knockover a vase without causing another impact. Strange, when I first heard Rebuild was gonna get made, my first thought was that I was so happy to see Kaworu again who was always my favorite character. Now, I got all the vintage Kaworu I could ever want and the joy about it doesn't seem to outweigh the rest of the movie... One reason for the drastic timeskip/drama dial up could in fact be Kaworu, Anno was gonna put emphasis on him from the start (which is why he's in 1.0) but maybe he couldn't find a way to make him appear like that "light in the darkness" with Rei perfectly saved and Asuka having become a better person, it's like Shinji's got all his friends right there, possibly even with the addition of Mari... so that was scrapped and they all had to go.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 19, 2012 12:50 am Split from here , I'm going to use this thread because I think that it's more fitting but it's also possible that we could need an "Analysis Of Kaworu's Actions in 3.0" thread sooner or later. ReiAyanami25 wrote: How can he take the blame those things that were not even his doing?

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 1:03 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: He's always been thinking about Shinji, he already knew him since the beginning and he seemed to know a lot about Shinji and his feelings

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 19, 2012 3:11 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: How did he already know Shinji? Excuse me if the answer is glaringly obvious.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 3:48 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: personally I think that he's a looper of some kind

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 4:40 am My main objections to Kaworu being a looper are that: a) He pretty much disappeared/died after GNR collapsed in EoE. b)He seemed fine with Instrumentality in EoTV. So I can't see how or why he'd be able to transcend the events that occurred, or why he would want to. He also pretty much fails to stop stuff from going to hell this time either. Kaworu has never had access to Quantum!Magic in the TV series or EoE, and I doubt that even Seeds of Life can physically travel back in time and alter the timeline outside of cryptic ghostly appearances.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Dec 19, 2012 4:45 am Also, it subverts the possibility of Rebuild standing on its own two feet as an independent telling of the story (or a similar one). I much prefer the possibility of an in-story explanation, maybe to be given in Final.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 19, 2012 4:45 am A possibility is that Kaworu's "looping" does not involve NGE as we know it. It could involve events that resemble NGE's, but it can be perfectly contained within NME itself. Given that the two continuities have such wildly different mechanics, this is probably the only version of looping-Kaworu I find workable.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Dec 19, 2012 4:45 am Also, it subverts the possibility of Rebuild standing on its own two feet as an independent telling of the story (or a similar one). I much prefer the possibility of an in-story explanation, maybe to be given in Final. (Oops - ninjaed; I think what I said is the same as Reichu)

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 4:50 am Reichu wrote: A possibility is that Kaworu's "looping" does not involve NGE as we know it. It could involve events that resemble NGE's, but it can be perfectly contained within NME itself. Given that the two continuities have such wildly different mechanics, this is probably the only version of looping-Kaworu I find workable.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 19, 2012 5:36 am And even though I didn't want it, this is now a loop theory discussion; should we move to the sequel theory thread perhaps? Reichu wrote: Given that the two continuities have such wildly different mechanics, this is probably the only version of looping-Kaworu I find workable.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Wed Dec 19, 2012 7:55 am I don't know how Kawrou knows so much about Shinji this time. But here's why I figure he likes Shinji so much. Kawrou loves humans. And Shinji is very human, especially because of his flaws and weaknesses. At the same time, as Anno said, Shinji is someone who somehow keeps finding the will to go on, in spite of his weakness. He isn't allways apealing, but Shinji is human. Also Kawrou is an Angel. I don't know how the four adams affects him soul, such as if it's still Adams. But he knows he was meant to cause 3rd impact. He doesn't want to though. But he could have. He says that he's like Shinji, in that he's been feared because of that. And the spears were his idea. He doesn't see it as "Shinji you idiot! I told you not to take the spears!" He sees it as "I'm sorry I got you into this mess."

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Dec 19, 2012 9:51 am Charsi wrote: I mean, Rei (Tentative) is like.. right there, for a number of years you would think.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 5:25 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Wed Dec 19, 2012 5:41 pm And if she has Lilith's soul, how's that affect the whole Convenent with Lilith thing Seele was going on about? A Convenent would indicate some sort of deal or agreement right? But by the time 2.0 is done Rei would want to make Shinji all Poka Poka, and not having to suffer by piloting anymore. Why did that post give me Deja Vu?

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Wed Dec 19, 2012 5:49 pm Darkwing wrote: And if she has Lilith's soul, how's that affect the whole Convenent with Lilith thing Seele was going on about? A Convenent would indicate some sort of deal or agreement right? But by the time 2.0 is done Rei would want to make Shinji all Poka Poka, and not having to suffer by piloting anymore.

Couldn't they just stick another 14 year old kid into Unit 13 with Kaworu? In fact, it makes you wonder why they even needed something like Unit 13 in the first place, why wouldn't a normal Eva work just as well? And if Gendo/SEELE needed Shinji with Kaworu for their plans, why did they wait 14 fucking years for WILL-E to get him rather than do it themselves? Too many fucking questions and plot holes.

Heck, I think Kaworu even tried to console Shinji once he resolved to kill himself. I'm sure there's something like Shinji being horrified at what's happening and bawling that he's such an idiot or something, and Kaworu says something like "It's not your fault, this happened because I'm an angel" and "sorry that I couldn't give you the happiness you needed, looks like you'll have to find your hope yourself " (not sure, puzzled together with fangirl jap) ...of course, the consolation doesn't quite work because even if the trap was meant for Kaworu, Shinji was the one who stepped into it, ironically to return the favor and take the burden of the decision from Kaworu. less pawn. It's like he can't knockover a vase without causing another impact. Now, I got all the vintage Kaworu I could ever want and the joy about it doesn't seem to outweigh the rest of the movie... One reason for the drastic timeskip/drama dial up could in fact be Kaworu, Anno was gonna put emphasis on him from the start (which is why he's in 1.0) but maybe he couldn't find a way to make him appear like that "light in the darkness" with Rei perfectly saved and Asuka having become a better person, it's like Shinji's got all his friends right there, possibly even with the addition of Mari... so that was scrapped and they all had to go.
